alerts.name: Incremental AD - Context Budget Exceeded
alerts.description: Alert when context budget exceeds 8K tokens (OSS model compatibility risk)

actions.subject: Incremental AD Context Budget Alert
actions.body:
Context budget {{contextBudgetPerRound}} tokens exceeded the 8K limit.

This may cause failures with small-context models.

Recommended action: Reduce alertsPerRound from current value.

alerts.name: Incremental AD - High Failure Rate
alerts.description: Alert when failure rate exceeds 5% (reliability issue)

alerts.name: Incremental AD - Delta Inefficiency
alerts.description: Alert when delta mode consistently reprocesses >80% of alerts (inefficient continuous monitoring)

actions.message:
⚠️ Delta mode inefficient: {{deltaSize}} new / {{totalAlertsProcessed}} total (>80%)
Session: {{sessionId}}
Possible causes:
- Schedule too infrequent
- Alerts being deleted/rotated
- Session state not persisting

alerts.name: Incremental AD - Slow Round Performance
alerts.description: Alert when average round duration exceeds 30s (performance degradation)

alerts.name: Incremental AD - Over-Merging Detection
alerts.description: Alert when merge rate exceeds 50% (potentially losing distinct insights)

actions.message:
ℹ️ High insight merge rate: {{mergedInsightCount}}/{{totalInsights}} (>50%)
May be over-merging distinct attacks
Consider increasing similarityThreshold

alerts.name: Incremental AD - Under-Merging Detection
alerts.description: Alert when merge rate is below 5% (potentially missing duplicates)

actions.message:
ℹ️ Low insight merge rate: {{mergedInsightCount}}/{{totalInsights}} (<5%)
May be missing similar attacks
Consider decreasing similarityThreshold

alerts.name: Incremental AD - Max Rounds Exceeded
alerts.description: Alert when runs consistently hit maxRounds limit (configuration issue)
